mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS foundation_calc_record ( record_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, project_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, node_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, foundation_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, operation VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, iteration_mode VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL, input_values_json JSON NULL, result_items_json JSON NOT NULL, derived_items_json JSON NOT NULL, graphics_json JSON NOT NULL, export_json JSON NOT NULL, INDEX idx_foundation_calc_project_node (project_id, node_id, created_at), INDEX idx_foundation_calc_node (node_id, created_at) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO foundation_calc_record ( record_id, project_id, node_id, foundation_type, operation, iteration_mode, title, created_at, input_values_json, result_items_json, derived_items_json, graphics_json, export_json ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{projectId}, #{nodeId}, #{foundationType}, #{operation}, #{iterationMode}, #{title}, #{createdAt}, #{inputValuesJson}, #{resultItemsJson}, #{derivedItemsJson}, #{graphicsJson}, #{exportJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT record_id, project_id, node_id, foundation_type, operation, iteration_mode, title, created_at, input_values_json, result_items_json, derived_items_json, graphics_json, export_json FROM foundation_calc_record WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND node_id = #{nodeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT record_id, project_id, node_id, foundation_type, operation, iteration_mode, title, created_at, input_values_json, result_items_json, derived_items_json, graphics_json, export_json FROM foundation_calc_record WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
